title: ExecutionTrace
description: Line-by-line reconstruction of a run. Produced by the Run Simulator (roles/03-run-simulator.md). At L0 the actual_path is a prediction; at L2+ it is captured from a real run via the adapter. Fidelity governs how much weight downstream conclusions carry (rubrics/fidelity-ladder.md).

fidelity.description: L0 design-prediction, L1 code-path execution, L2 end-to-end run, L3 live-environment.

ideal_path.description: The best-case route (from the scenario's expected_ideal_path, expanded).

actual_path.description: The route the target took (real) or is predicted to take (simulated).

final_answer.description: The target's final user-facing output (captured verbatim at L2+, predicted at L0).

annotations.description: Flags the Simulator must surface when present.

cost.description: Resource profile. Real values at L2+; estimates at L0 (mark estimated:true).

evidence_ref.description: Path to the raw trace/log this record summarizes (runs/<run>/raw_traces/<scenario_id>.*).

action.description: Tool call, delegation, or response emitted.

output_shape.description: Shape/summary of what came back (not full payload).
